description: Aegis Core model manifest — provenance, integrity, and licensing for every model artifact in /models/. The C++ engine model loader MUST verify SHA-256 hashes against this manifest before mmap. See ARCHITECTURE.md §10.1 and docs/adr/0009-cpp-build-and-toolchain.md.

models.description: OpenAI Whisper large-v3-turbo, 4-bit Q4_0 quantization via whisper.cpp. Primary transcription model for all deployment modes.
models.sha256: PLACEHOLDER — compute after downloading the actual model file
models.origin_version: PLACEHOLDER — pin to a specific whisper.cpp release tag
models.notes: ~1.5 GB RAM when loaded. Version bump procedure: see ADR-0009 §Upstream whisper.cpp version bump procedure.

models.filename: PLACEHOLDER — select a specific diarization embedding model in Phase 1
models.description: Speaker embedding model for anonymous diarization (Speaker_0, Speaker_1, ...). Performs clustering only — no voiceprint matching, no biometric identification (ADR-0012).
models.license: PLACEHOLDER — must be permissive (MIT, Apache-2.0, BSD); GPL/AGPL blocked per ARCHITECTURE.md §10.1
models.notes: ~1.0 GB RAM when loaded. Model selection is a Phase 1 decision. Candidates: pyannote/wespeaker-voxceleb-resnet34 (MIT), speechbrain/spkrec-ecapa-voxceleb (Apache-2.0).

models.filename: PLACEHOLDER — select a specific sentence-transformer model in Phase 1
models.description: Sentence-transformer model for RAG vector similarity. Used to embed transcript segments and RAG corpus documents for hnswlib nearest-neighbor search.
models.notes: ~256 MB RAM estimate. Used by the in-process hnswlib query path (Local mode) and as the query encoder for Cloud mode vector DB.

models.description: Meta Llama-3-8B-Instruct, 4-bit Q4_K_M quantization via llama.cpp. Optional generative LLM for RAG answer synthesis. NOT part of MVP.
models.notes: ~4.8 GB RAM when loaded. Enabling this on a 16 GB machine leaves room for only ~3 concurrent sessions (see ADR-0010). Phase 5+ only.
